//: Example Codex hooks for know-your-limits (also expressible as [hooks] tables in ~/.codex/config.toml). Fix the path to kyl_hook.py. TRIGGER-ONLY, same discipline as the Claude version. NOTE: Codex PostToolUse exposes tool_response but not a numeric exit code, so STALL detection is best-effort on Codex (it matches error/traceback text in the output). Set KYL_WORKER_TIER=cheap for cheap workers. It never makes the senior call, never blocks, never marks done.
